response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, but the role requires a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategic advisory experience. The resume shows no AI research background, no advanced degree, no track record of shipping AI products at scale, and no evidence of operating at principal/director scope advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI roadmaps.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship signal: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks, open-source platform founder
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale
Career titles top out at Staff/Senior — no principal/director-level IC or strategic advisory experience
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy depth beyond AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs director-level IC principal scope
Strong engineering craftsmanship and emerging AI-agent tooling work
